mapper.select: SELECT no, name, is_admin_only, sort_order FROM ow_board_category ORDER BY sort_order
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ow_board_category(no, name, is_admin_only, sort_order) VALUES(seq_ow_board_category_no.NEXTVAL, #{name}, #{isAdminOnly}, #{sortOrder})
mapper.sql:
WHERE b.is_deleted = 'N'
AND b.category_no = #{categoryNo}
AND b.title LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
AND b.content LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
AND NVL(m.nickname, b.guest_name) LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
AND (b.title LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR b.content LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%')
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ow_board b LEFT JOIN ow_member m ON b.writer_id = m.id

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT ROWNUM AS rn, a.* FROM ( SELECT b.no, b.category_no, c.name AS category_name, b.writer_id, NVL(m.nickname, b.guest_name) AS writer_nickname, b.title, b.view_cnt, b.like_cnt, b.is_deleted, TO_CHAR(b.reg_date, 'yyyy-mm-dd') AS reg_date, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ow_comment WHERE board_no = b.no AND is_deleted = 'N') AS comment_cnt FROM ow_board b LEFT JOIN ow_member m ON b.writer_id = m.id JOIN ow_board_category c ON b.category_no = c.no
ORDER BY b.no DESC ) a WHERE ROWNUM <= #{endRow} ) WHERE rn >= #{startRow}

SELECT b.no, b.category_no, c.name AS category_name, b.writer_id, NVL(m.nickname, b.guest_name) AS writer_nickname, b.guest_name, b.title, b.content, b.view_cnt, b.like_cnt, b.dislike_cnt, b.is_deleted, b.image_stored, b.image_orig, TO_CHAR(b.reg_date, 'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi') AS reg_date, TO_CHAR(b.update_date, 'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi') AS update_date FROM ow_board b LEFT JOIN ow_member m ON b.writer_id = m.id JOIN ow_board_category c ON b.category_no = c.no WHERE b.no = #{no}
SELECT guest_password FROM ow_board WHERE no = #{no}
mapper.insert:
SELECT seq_ow_board_no.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO ow_board(no, category_no, writer_id, title, content, guest_name, guest_password) VALUES(#{no}, #{categoryNo}, #{writerId}, #{title}, #{content}, #{guestName}, #{guestPassword})
mapper.update: UPDATE ow_board SET category_no = #{categoryNo}, title = #{title}, content = #{content}, update_date = SYSDATE WHERE no = #{no}
UPDATE ow_board SET image_stored = #{stored}, image_orig = #{orig} WHERE no = #{no}
UPDATE ow_board SET is_deleted = 'Y', update_date = SYSDATE WHERE no = #{no}
UPDATE ow_board SET view_cnt = view_cnt + 1 WHERE no = #{no}
mapper.select: SELECT vote_type FROM ow_board_vote WHERE member_id = #{memberId} AND board_no = #{boardNo}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ow_board_vote(member_id, board_no, vote_type) VALUES(#{memberId}, #{boardNo}, #{type})
mapper.update: UPDATE ow_board_vote SET vote_type = #{type}, reg_date = SYSDATE WHERE member_id = #{memberId} AND board_no = #{boardNo}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM ow_board_vote WHERE member_id = #{memberId} AND board_no = #{boardNo}
mapper.update: UPDATE ow_board SET like_cnt = like_cnt + 1 WHERE no = #{boardNo}
UPDATE ow_board SET like_cnt = GREATEST(like_cnt - 1, 0) WHERE no = #{boardNo}
UPDATE ow_board SET dislike_cnt = dislike_cnt + 1 WHERE no = #{boardNo}
UPDATE ow_board SET dislike_cnt = GREATEST(dislike_cnt - 1, 0) WHERE no = #{boardNo}
mapper.select: SELECT b.no, b.category_no, c.name AS category_name, b.title, b.view_cnt, b.like_cnt, b.is_deleted, TO_CHAR(b.reg_date, 'yyyy-mm-dd') AS reg_date, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ow_comment WHERE board_no = b.no AND is_deleted = 'N') AS comment_cnt FROM ow_board b JOIN ow_board_category c ON b.category_no = c.no WHERE b.writer_id = #{writerId} AND b.is_deleted = 'N' ORDER BY b.no DESC
